composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in app.py for the 'FoodDelivery' web application.
- Ensure all Flask routes correctly render templates.
- Resolve the TemplateNotFound error by verifying and documenting the requirement that all HTML template files must be saved inside a 'templates' directory relative to app.py.
- Review and improve file path handling for template rendering and static files if needed.
- Maintain all original backend functionalities  routing for all pages, data management via local text files, no authentication, and starting the website at the Dashboard page ('/').
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure backend routes match frontend URLs and template names.
composition.Programmer 2:
Implement and organize all frontend HTML template files for the 'FoodDelivery' web application.
- Create and save all nine HTML template files (dashboard.html, restaurants.html, menu.html, item_details.html, cart.html, checkout.html, active_orders.html, tracking.html, reviews.html) plus write_review.html inside a 'templates' directory relative to app.py.
- Follow the detailed page design and element IDs as specified in the requirements document.
- Ensure all frontend navigation uses backend route URLs (via url_for) and that template filenames correspond exactly to those expected by the backend.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to confirm that frontend templates are correctly named and placed so Flask can locate them without TemplateNotFound errors.
